title: telinaria cumingii
intro: Telinaria cumingii, also known as the Fijian fern or Fijian lady fern, is a species of plant in the fern family (Aspleniaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an antiseptic and antipyretic. Telinaria cumingii can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
